channel.description: Recent content in Sources on Lily Wasko

item.title: Relevant details from 'Increasing ... throughput in quantum networks by combining quantum linear network coding with superdense coding'
item.description: Increasing the classical data throughput in quantum networks by combining quantum linear network coding with superdense coding by Steven Herbert - source analysis

item.title: Relevant details from 'N-qubit ... superdense coding through the composite GHZ–Bell channel'
item.description: N-qubit quantum teleportation, information splitting and superdense coding through the composite GHZ–Bell channel by Debashis Saha and Prasanta K. Panigrahi - source analysis
